name: Mitigating LLM Sycophancy in Code Smell Detection Using Evidence-Guided Reasoning Prompts

description: arXiv:2607.10411v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used for code smell detection tasks due to their ability to interpret program semantics. However, their reliability in this context remains poorly explored, particularly under varying prompt conditions where model predictions may be influenced by external cues rather than code characteristics. One su...
author: Istiaq Ahmed Fahad, Kamruzzaman Asif, Md. Nurul Ahad Tawhid
